Welcome to HearWise

Protect your hearing. Enjoy your music.

Your ears are with you for life.

See what a difference healthy listening habits make.

⚠️ Without HearWise
🔊
Volume maxed out
Volume92 dB — Dangerous
🔔
Tinnitus (ringing)
Persistent ringing after long sessions — a warning sign of damage.
😵
Listening fatigue
Difficulty concentrating. Exhaustion from overstimulated ears.
📉
Long-term hearing loss
Noise-induced damage is permanent. Hair cells don't grow back.
✅ With HearWise
🎧
Safe volume levels
Volume68 dB — Safe
📊
Real-time awareness
Live alerts when exposure approaches safe limits — before damage happens.
🛡️
Long-term protection
Consistent safe habits preserve clarity and hearing health for decades.
💡
Personalized insights
Personalized recommendations tailored to your exact listening patterns.
🎧 Hear the difference — right now
Press a button above to hear the difference with headphones

    Live Ear Recovery
    Safe-Listening SessionsAuto-detects session type from your music · enforces mode-specific ear rests
    Live tracking
    Connect Spotify — Aura tracks your noise dose in real time and starts a recovery timer when safe-listening limits are reached.
    Not connected
    Connect Spotify to see live playback
    Track, artist & volume update in real time
    —
    volume
    ⏸️
    Ear rest required
    Your sprint finished — take a silence break while the timer runs.

    Pomodoro + safe listening. Focus & Study sessions use Pomodoro cycles (25/5 default) while Spotify plays — short breaks between cycles, WHO ear rest every 4 pomodoros. Chill, workout & sleep modes keep their own sprint timers in Settings.

    You
    Private · this device only
    Your Info
    Focus & Audio
    Audio Auto-Pilot

    When on, HearWise lowers your Mac system volume to stay under your safe cap — your Spotify slider stays where you set it. Requires running HearWise locally on your Mac. Pause/break-at-end apply to focus blocks only.

    Auto-lower Spotify volume (fallback)
    Auto-lower Mac system volume
    Auto recovery break
    Pause Spotify at end
    Start break at end
    Safe Listening Timers

    Focus & Study uses Pomodoro cycles (set in Recovery Tracker). Other session types: set sprint length here — ear rests follow WHO/NIOSH guidance.

    Ear Rest Timer
    10:00

    Ear Rest Time

    Take your headphones off for a few minutes. Your ears bounce back fastest when it's quiet.

    🔒 Break locked — finish the timer before continuing

    10:00

    Listening preferences

    Adjust session timers and how HearWise detects your music on Spotify.

    🔔

    Session Complete!

    Take a 5-minute break before your next listen. Your ears recover fastest in the first minutes of silence.
